opportunities.description:
[Hiring] Remote Appointment Setter / Cold Caller | $15/hr Base + Commission + Residuals

I’m hiring an experienced remote appointment setter to help with outbound calling and qualified appointment booking. The role is simple: make outbound calls, have real conversations with decision-makers, qualify interest, and schedule calls for a payment savings program. This is a good fit for someone who already has phone sales experience and knows how to handle objections without sounding scripted.
